'''Kerros Tower''' was a high tower located in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. The tower was home to the city's traffic controllers.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
*''[[The Jewel of Yavin]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''
